name: Marigold Rakhi — Red
shortDescription: A hand-crocheted marigold in festive red, on a soft cotton band.
description: Each marigold is crocheted petal by petal in pure cotton yarn, finished with a comfortable adjustable band. No two are exactly alike — that's the handmade charm.

name: Bhaiya-Bhabhi Set
shortDescription: A matching pair — a lumba for bhabhi and a rakhi for bhaiya.
description: A coordinated set: an ornate lumba rakhi for bhabhi and a classic wrist rakhi for bhaiya, crocheted in matching festive tones. Comes gift-ready.

name: Peacock Rakhi
shortDescription: A crocheted peacock motif in teal and gold thread.
description: A detailed peacock crocheted in teal, blue and metallic-gold accent yarn. A statement piece for someone who loves something a little different.

name: Mini Flower Rakhi (Kids)
shortDescription: A small, light flower rakhi sized for little wrists.
description: A tiny, lightweight flower rakhi in cheerful colours, sized and softened for children. Sold singly.

name: Pearl Cluster Rakhi
shortDescription: Crochet rosettes with a cluster of faux pearls.
description: Soft crochet rosettes gathered around a cluster of faux pearls on a cream band — understated and elegant.

name: Traditional Red & Gold Rakhi
shortDescription: Classic red-and-gold crochet rakhi with a central bead.
description: The timeless one: red and gold crochet work around a central decorative bead, on a sturdy braided band.
